provider_boundary: This artifact simulates the MCP/DataHub read contract while keeping the hackathon demo runnable without Docker, credentials, or external network access.

tool_read_plan.name: datahub.get_entity
tool_read_plan.purpose: Read cataloged dataset identity, schema, ownership, and glossary context before the agent chooses an action.

tool_read_plan.name: datahub.get_lineage
tool_read_plan.purpose: Confirm the data came from the uploaded CSV through CAT's context mapper and decision loop.

tool_read_plan.name: cat.get_agent_context_packet
tool_read_plan.purpose: Read CAT's minimum action-safety contract derived from DataHub context.

context.policy_summary: Internal review tasks may be queued from trusted context; external outreach is blocked unless owner and verified contact context exist.

decisions.safe_next_step: Ask for missing customer contact owner before follow-up

approval_queue.question: Who owns this customer contact and is external follow-up approved?
approval_queue.reason: Ask for missing customer contact owner before follow-up
